skill.name: sc-managing-worktrees
skill.author: randlee
skill.description: Create, manage, scan, update, and clean up git worktrees for parallel development with protected branch safeguards. Use when working on multiple branches simultaneously, isolating experiments, updating protected branches (main/develop), or when user mentions "worktree", "parallel branches", "feature isolation", "branch cleanup", "worktree status", or "update main/develop".
